articles.title: Cleaning Hack: This Simple Trick With Ice Cubes Will Make Your Toilet Sparkle!
articles.description: Struggling with stubborn toilet stains that just won't go away? What if we told you that some ice from your fridge could make your toilet cleaner work much better? Here’s a smart trick using ice and toilet cleaner that makes cleaning easier and gets rid of tough stains and bad smells for good.

articles.title: Is Michael Saylor’s Strategy changing its Bitcoin playbook? MSTR sells $2.5 million of BTC for the first time since 2022 - here's why
articles.description: Michael Saylor​'s Strategy Bitcoin (BTC USD) sale: Strategy has sold 32 bitcoin for approximately 2.5 million dollars. This is the company's first bitcoin sale since late 2022. The proceeds will help fund distributions on its preferred stock. Strategy continues to hold a significant amount of bitcoin. The company's approach to bitcoin accumulation remains its core strategy.

articles.title: Russia announces aviation fuel export ban until November 30
Obama's White House Instagram Hacked As Strange Message Sparks Questions | WATCH
articles.description: A dormant Obama-era White House Instagram account suddenly became the center of a bizarre hacking mystery after strange AI-generated posts and controversial messages appeared online. The official @obamawhitehouse account, inactive since President Donald Trump's first inauguration in 2017, was reportedly compromised before Meta stepped in to secure it. Who was behind the cyber attack, and why target an account that had been silent for years? Here's everything we know.

articles.title: ECLGS 5.0 sees strong demand, applications cross Rs 1.71 lakh cr
articles.description: Launched to counter the West Asia crisis impact, ECLGS 5.0 has seen huge demand, with 2.62 lakh applications worth Rs 1.71 lakh crore. Sanctions total Rs 35,194 crore, with MSMEs being the primary beneficiaries of the credit scheme.

articles.title: Taapsee Pannu 'tortured' herself to get flat midriff during younger days: "I worked out intensely almost overpushed myself"
articles.description: Actor Taapsee Pannu recently encouraged women to stop putting themselves through extreme measures in pursuit of unrealistic beauty standards. Reflecting on her own experience, the actress opened up about the pressure she once felt to achieve a flat midriff and the impact it had on her mindset.

articles.title: Himachal kicks off Census 2027; snow-bound regions get early start
articles.description: Himachal Pradesh launched the self-enumeration phase of Census 2027, with Governor Kavinder Gupta urging citizens to participate via an online portal. Snow-bound and tribal regions of the state will be covered early, from September 11 to September 30.

articles.description: Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty, after their Singapore Open victory, will lead India's badminton squad with PV Sindhu at the Indonesia Open 2026. The team also features Lakshya Sen, HS Prannoy, and the returning duo of Treesa-Gayatri.

articles.title: India repatriates 2,411 from Myanmar scams, 150+ still trapped
articles.description: The MEA confirmed that 2,411 Indians trapped in cyber scam compounds in Myanmar have been repatriated over the last 1.5 years. However, over 150 citizens are still believed to be stuck, with India working with Myanmar for their return.

articles.title: Forgery row: Ex-TMC MLA Sandipan Saha writes to WB Assembly Speaker

articles.title: TMC expels Sandipan Saha, Ritabrata Banerjee for 'anti-party' acts
articles.description: TMC expelled leaders Sandipan Saha and Ritabrata Banerjee for 'anti-party' activities. Saha retorted he was pleased to be ousted for upholding morality. The expulsion follows their complaint alleging forged signatures on a party document.

articles.title: Indian students drown in Kazakhstan; FAIMA seeks MEA's help for bodies
articles.description: FAIMA Doctors Association has asked the MEA for help in bringing back the bodies of Brijraj Meena and Nikhil Kuri, two medical students from Rajasthan who drowned in Kazakhstan. They were studying at Karaganda Medical University.

articles.title: DSSSB Advt 03/2026 released for 1,979 Group B and C vacancies, applications begin June 16
articles.description: The Delhi Subordinate Services Selection Board (DSSSB) has released Advertisement No. 03/2026 announcing 1,979 vacancies for various Group B and Group C posts across Delhi government departments, autonomous bodies and local bodies. The online application process will begin on June 16, 2026, and continue until July 15, 2026. Vacancies are available for teaching, scientific, technical and administrative positions. Selection will involve prescribed recruitment procedures, including examinations and verification stages.

articles.title: Inflation Blow: LPG Rates Increased in Delhi and Kolkata
articles.description: Consumers have received another inflation-related setback as the prices of commercial LPG cylinders have been increased in several cities across India. In Delhi, the price of a 19-kg commercial LPG cylinder has been raised by ₹42, taking the new rate to ₹3,113.50. Similarly, in Kolkata, the price has increased by ₹53.50, bringing the cost of a 19-kg commercial cylinder to ₹3,255.50. The price hike is expected to impact businesses that rely heavily on commercial LPG, including restaurants, hotels, and small enterprises. In addition, the cost of 5-kg free-trade LPG cylinders has also been increased by ₹11. Following the revision, the new price of a 5-kg free-trade LPG cylinder in Delhi stands at ₹821.50. The revised rates have come into effect immediately from today. However, there is some relief for households, as the prices of domestic LPG cylinders remain unchanged for now. The latest increase adds to concerns over rising costs and inflationary pressures affecting consumers and businesses alike.

Rising from previous setbacks, the 19-year-old sprinted with determination in the opening leg, finally realizing his dream of standing on an international podium. His next goal? Aiming for glory at the U20 World Athletics Championships.

While there have been rumors of Blake Lively trying to get back in touch with Taylor Swift, it seems she’s going through a tough time in her life.

articles.title: BJP doesn't back violence, says Gaurav Vallabh on Abhishek attack
articles.description: BJP's Gaurav Vallabh denies backing violence after TMC MP Abhishek Banerjee was attacked in Sonarpur. He claims TMC's own workers are rejecting leaders. Abhishek Banerjee has alleged the attack was 'BJP-sponsored'. Five people have been arrested.

articles.title: NEET UG 2026: IYC protests in Pune, demands action against Pradhan
articles.description: Indian Youth Congress members protested in Pune over the NEET UG 2026 paper leak, calling for action against Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan. IYC President Uday Bhanu Chib vowed to continue protests until justice is served to impacted youth.

articles.title: Spencer Leak Jr. Cause of Death: Chicago Icon Who Handled Rev. Jesse Jackson's Funeral Services Dies at 56
articles.description: Spencer Leak Jr., vice president of the historic Leak and Sons Funeral Homes in Chicago, has died at the age of 56. Leak Jr. was the third generation of a family whose funeral business dates back to 1933, handling more than 3,000 funerals annually in the Chicago area and playing a notable role in the Civil Rights movement.
